Conversion complete. The knowledge file for `libraries-tag_reference--script` has been generated with:

- **1 section**: script-tag (scriptタグ)
- **12 search hints**: type, id, charset, language, src, defer, xmlSpace, secure, scriptタグ, XHTML属性, タグ属性, URI指定
- **Cross-references preserved**: :ref:`tag-specify_uri` maintained in RST syntax for post-processing
- **Markdown table**: All 8 attributes (type, id, charset, language, src, defer, xmlSpace, secure) documented with descriptions and constraints

sections.script-tag:
動的属性の使用可否：可

| 属性 | 説明 |
|---|---|
| type **必須** | XHTMLのtype属性 |
| id | XHTMLのid属性 |
| charset | XHTMLのcharset属性 |
| language | XHTMLのlanguage属性 |
| src | XHTMLのsrc属性。:ref:`tag-specify_uri` を参照 |
| defer | XHTMLのdefer属性 |
| xmlSpace | XHTMLのxml:space属性 |
| secure | URIをhttpsにするか否か。httpsにする場合は `true`、しない場合は `false` |

sections.h3_split_reason: plain text less than 2000 characters; no h3 subsections in source
